name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

labels: enhancement

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. e.g. "I always have to manually add a phone field to the register view..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Proposed command / API (if applicable)

```bash
php artisan ui:adminlte --auth --theme=dark
```

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or links here.
